again SMS message reminding them to schedule or just checking in so as quite a few uses but we only use really that core campaign and automation functionality and we'll show you where we use it and how to if you want to explore with it you certainly can there are a lot of great features to it I hope you enjoyed this video we're going to give you a few videos showing you how to do different things with agile CRM in the context of how we use it of course there's a lot more out there hope you have a great rest of your day
